title: antirrhinum antirrhiniflorum
intro: Antirrhinum antirrhiniflorum, also known as the dragon flower, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the snapdragon family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Antirrhinum antirrhiniflorum is often prepared as an infusion or decoction to be used as a remedy for various ailments, and it can also be found in some herbal supplements and teas.
